overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a waterfront promenade in a futuristic neon-lit city. The player passes boxers sparring on the dock, circles around the water with views of skyscrapers, and ascends stairs to an upper level with vendors.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront dock walkway between concrete wall and canal

events.description: encounter two individuals boxing with gloves on the wooden dock platform
pass the boxers and continue straight along the waterfront path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront dock, observing the boxing match and surroundings

notable_agents.action: two boxers sparring with boxing gloves on the dock platform

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with colorful graffiti tags in pink and white
calm water canal with wooden posts and reflective surface
large industrial concrete building with exposed beams and framework
towering futuristic skyscrapers covered in bright neon advertisements and holographic displays
wooden planked walkway extending over the water with metal railings

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow waterfront dock with a graffiti-covered concrete wall on the left and a calm canal on the right. Two boxers are sparring on the wooden platform ahead. In the distance, massive neon-lit skyscrapers dominate the skyline under a clear morning sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront curve with panoramic city views

events.description: turning right along the curved waterfront path to follow the canal bend

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved waterfront with expansive views of the neon skyline and elevated highways

entered.detail: multi-level highway overpass with red and teal structural beams crossing over the water

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wide curve along the water, revealing an expansive view of the neon cityscape. An elevated highway bridge with distinctive red structural elements spans across the right side. The wooden dock continues under bright morning sunlight with clear blue skies overhead.

events.description: approaching a second pair of boxers sparring near the advertisement-covered wall
ascending the wide concrete stairs to the upper promenade level

agents.ego_description: approaching the stairs while passing boxers, then climbing to the upper waterfront promenade

notable_agents.action: two boxers fighting in front of the wall with large advertisements

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with yellow railings leading up to the upper level
large vertical billboards displaying colorful advertisements including a ramen poster and a muscular figure
sloped concrete wall covered in purple and white graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: Approaching a concrete stairway flanked by walls covered in graffiti and large advertisements. Two boxers are sparring at the base of the stairs. The camera ascends the steps, moving from the lower dock level up toward the upper promenade, with the elevated highway now visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated promenade with vendor stalls under overpass

events.description: emerging onto the upper promenade walkway with vendor stalls and seating areas

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper promenade past vendor stalls and pedestrians sitting on benches

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench near a vendor stall with umbrella

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure casting shadows over the walkway
wide concrete walkway with green painted sections and scattered debris
market stalls with umbrellas and seating areas along the left side
large rectangular planters with dried vegetation

segments.scene_description: Walking along the upper promenade beneath a massive concrete overpass. The area features vendor stalls with umbrellas, potted plants, and scattered seating. The path continues forward with the elevated highway visible in the distance to the left, while the right side is dominated by the shadow of the overpass structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow waterfront dock into the bustling upper levels of a neon-lit futuristic city. It begins by moving along a graffiti-covered concrete wall beside a calm canal, passing two boxers sparring on a wooden platform beneath a skyline of massive skyscrapers. As the path opens into a wide curve, the view expands to reveal a bright morning sky and a distinctive red elevated highway bridge spanning the water. The camera then approaches the base of a concrete stairway, ascending past more graffiti and advertisements to transition from the lower dock to the upper promenade. Finally, the scene shifts beneath a massive concrete overpass, moving through a shaded area filled with vendor stalls, umbrellas, and potted plants.
